import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_line_or_empty()

  mut nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  mut take = k
  if take > nums.len()
    take = nums.len()
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match list.max(nums)
    when Some(m)
      match list.index_of(nums, m)
      when Some(idx)
        nums = remove_at(nums, idx)
        if i == 0
          output = "#{m}"
        else
          output = "#{output} #{m}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(output)
end
